changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS document_counter;

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE vehicle_submodel DROP CONSTRAINT ck_vehicle_submodel_powertrain; ALTER TABLE vehicle_submodel DROP COLUMN powertrain;

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS endorsement; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS quotation_driver;

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM role_permission WHERE permission_code = 'policy.endorse'; DELETE FROM permission WHERE code = 'policy.endorse';

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE customer DROP COLUMN title, first_name, last_name, birth_date;

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS customer_title;

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS notification;

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM role_permission WHERE permission_code = 'notification.read'; DELETE FROM permission WHERE code = 'notification.read';

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM role_permission WHERE permission_code IN ('user.read', 'user.manage'); DELETE FROM permission WHERE code IN ('user.read', 'user.manage');

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE customer DROP COLUMN line_user_id;

changeSet.author: rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
rattaroj.nit
